name: sourcey.build
description: Build a Sourcey documentation site for a configured project.

homepage_url.description: Canonical project homepage URL to include in docs context.

brand_name.description: Human-facing brand or project name for the generated docs context.

docs_inputs.description: Structured docs inputs, for example {"mode":"config","config":"sourcey.config.ts"} or {"mode":"openapi","spec":"openapi.yaml"}.

output_dir.description: Output directory for Sourcey docs; defaults to <project>/.sourcey/runx-docs.

sourcey_bin.description: Explicit Sourcey executable or JS entrypoint; defaults to SOURCEY_BIN or sourcey on PATH.
